name: Css.Reset
comment:
This module helps you to reset base styles. Compile it with your elm-css code.

  - Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS
  - html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet
  - Normalize.css
  - ress
  - sanitize.css

@docs ericMeyer, html5Doctor, normalize, ress, sanitize

values.name: ericMeyer
values.comment: Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS which was converted to [rtfeldman/elm-css](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/rtfeldman/elm-css/latest/).

values.name: html5Doctor
values.comment: html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet which was converted to [rtfeldman/elm-css](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/rtfeldman/elm-css/latest/).

name: Html.ResetCss
comment:
This module helps you to reset base styles. You can use them with elm/html.

  - Eric Meyer’s Reset CSS
  - html5doctor.com Reset Stylesheet
  - Normalize.css
  - ress
  - sanitize.css

@docs ericMeyer, html5Doctor, normalize, ress, sanitize
